technology.title: Nvidia’s Jensen Huang joins Trump as tech dominates China trip
technology.summary: Invitation to be part of group including Elon Musk and Tim Cook highlights American AI and tech ambitions The billionaire chief executive of the chipmaker Nvidia, Jensen Huang, has joined Donald Trump’s China delegation after a reported last-minute invitation, highlighting the US’s AI and tech ambitions. Huang will join a roster of US bosses including the Tesla chief executive and X owner, Elon Musk, the Apple chief executive, Tim Cook, and Goldman Sachs’s David Solomon at Trump’s 36-hour meeting with the Chinese president, Xi Jinping. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Invitation to be part of group including Elon Musk and Tim Cook highlights American AI and tech ambitions The billionaire chief executive of the chipmaker Nvidia, Jensen Huang, has joined Donald Trump’s China delegation after a reported last-minute invitation, highlighting the US’s AI and tech ambitions. Huang will join a roster of US bosses including the Tesla chief executive and X owner, Elon Musk, the Apple chief executive, Tim Cook, and Goldman Sachs’s David Solomon at Trump’s 36-hour meeting with the Chinese president, Xi Jinping. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: Nvidia的首席執行官黃仁勳受邀參加唐納德·特朗普的中國代表團，與特斯拉的埃隆·馬斯克、蘋果的蒂姆·庫克及高盛的戴維·所羅門等美國科技領袖一同出席。此次會議將持續36小時，重點在於美國在人工智慧及科技領域的雄心，並與中國國家主席習近平進行會談。
briefing.background: 美中兩國在科技領域的競爭日益激烈，特別是在人工智慧和半導體產業。美國政府對中國的科技發展持謹慎態度，並試圖透過高層會議加強與中國的對話。此次會議的背景是美國希望在全球科技競爭中保持領先地位，並尋求與中國達成某種程度的合作或理解，以減少貿易摩擦和技術衝突。
briefing.analysis: 此次會議的參與者均為美國科技界的重要人物，顯示出美國對於中國市場的重視及其在全球科技戰略中的地位。黃仁勳的參與可能代表著Nvidia在中國市場的擴展意圖，特別是在AI技術的應用上。特朗普與習近平的會談將可能涉及科技合作、貿易政策及市場准入等議題。各方利益關係複雜，特朗普可能希望利用這些科技領袖的影響力來促進美中之間的經濟合作，但同時也面臨來自國內對中國政策的壓力。此行的結果將對未來美中科技關係及全球科技市場產生深遠影響。

technology.title: Sam Altman defends OpenAI in courtroom showdown with Elon Musk
technology.summary: The OpenAI chief rejects claims he deceived Elon Musk as high-stakes AI trial nears its end Sign up for the Breaking News US newsletter email The OpenAI CEO, Sam Altman , took the stand on Tuesday to defend himself and his company against a lawsuit by Elon Musk . Altman is set to be one of the final witnesses in the trial, which has pitted two of the tech industry’s most powerful men against each other in a dramatic courtroom showdown. Musk has accused Altman and OpenAI of breaking the AI firm’s founding agreement by restructuring it into a for-profit enterprise, alleging that Altman essentially swindled him into co-founding the company and providing tens of millions in financial backing. Musk also claims Altman unjustly enriched himself in the process and is seeking the CEO’s removal from OpenAI, the redistribution of $134bn to the firm’s non-profit and the undoing of its for-profit conversion. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: The OpenAI chief rejects claims he deceived Elon Musk as high-stakes AI trial nears its end Sign up for the Breaking News US newsletter email The OpenAI CEO, Sam Altman , took the stand on Tuesday to defend himself and his company against a lawsuit by Elon Musk . Altman is set to be one of the final witnesses in the trial, which has pitted two of the tech industry’s most powerful men against each other in a dramatic courtroom showdown. Musk has accused Altman and OpenAI of breaking the AI firm’s founding agreement by restructuring it into a for-profit enterprise, alleging that Altman essentially swindled him into co-founding the company and providing tens of millions in financial backing. Musk also claims Altman unjustly enriched himself in the process and is seeking the CEO’s removal from OpenAI, the redistribution of $134bn to the firm’s non-profit and the undoing of its for-profit conversion. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman 在與 Elon Musk 的高風險 AI 訴訟中出庭作證，為自己和公司辯護。Musk 指控 Altman 和 OpenAI 違反創始協議，將公司重組為盈利企業，並聲稱 Altman 欺騙他共同創辦公司，導致他投入數千萬資金。Musk 進一步要求將 Altman 逐出 OpenAI，並要求將 1340 億美元重新分配給公司的非營利部分，撤銷其盈利轉型。
briefing.background: OpenAI 成立於 2015 年，最初是一個非營利機構，旨在推動人工智慧的安全發展。隨著 AI 技術的迅速發展，OpenAI 在 2019 年轉型為盈利模式，這引發了創始人 Elon Musk 的不滿。他認為這一轉變背離了最初的使命，並對公司治理產生了質疑。Musk 對 Altman 的控訴涉及公司治理、資金運用及利益分配等多方面，這場訴訟不僅是兩位科技巨頭的對抗，也反映了 AI 行業內部對於倫理與盈利之間的緊張關係。
briefing.analysis: 在這場訴訟中，Sam Altman 強調 Elon Musk 對 OpenAI 的控制欲，並指出 Musk 曾多次試圖獲得對公司的完全控制權。這一點在 BBC 的報導中得到了補充，指出 Musk 的企圖心可能是訴訟背後的動機之一。另一方面，Musk 的指控則集中在 Altman 的商業行為上，認為其行為不當導致自己受到損失。這場官司不僅關乎個人之間的爭執，還可能影響 OpenAI 的未來發展方向及其在 AI 領域的地位。隨著訴訟進入尾聲，未來的裁決將對科技界產生深遠影響，尤其是在公司治理與盈利模式的討論上。

supporting_titles: Elon Musk said control of OpenAI should go to his children, Sam Altman tells jury
Elon Musk Had ‘Hair-Raising’ Idea of Passing OpenAI On to His Kids, Sam Altman Says
supporting_summaries: Sam Altman said Elon Musk tried many times for total control of OpenAI, which he's now suing.
Musk’s lawyers questioned Altman over allegations of deception and his network of financial investments, but the OpenAI CEO painted a picture of Musk as obsessed with controlling the company.

technology.title: Musk mulled handing OpenAI to his children, Altman testifies
technology.summary: Altman said that Musk's focus on controlling the initial for-profit gave him pause because OpenAI was dedicated to keeping advanced AI out of the hands of a single person, and Altman, with his experience running the prominent startup accelerator Y Combinator, knew "founders who had control usually did not give it up."

briefing.news_focus: Altman said that Musk's focus on controlling the initial for-profit gave him pause because OpenAI was dedicated to keeping advanced AI out of the hands of a single person, and Altman, with his experience running the prominent startup accelerator Y Combinator, knew "founders who had control usually did not give it up."
briefing.news_focus_zh: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman 在法庭上證實，Elon Musk 曾多次表達希望將 OpenAI 的控制權交給他的孩子。這一表述引發了對於 Musk 對 OpenAI 控制權的關注，因為該公司致力於防止先進人工智慧落入單一個人手中。Altman 指出，創始人通常不會輕易放棄控制權，這使他對 Musk 的意圖感到擔憂。
briefing.background: OpenAI 成立於 2015 年，旨在推動人工智慧的安全發展，並避免其被濫用。最初，OpenAI 是以非營利模式運作，但隨著資金需求的增加，於 2019 年轉型為有限利潤公司。Elon Musk 是 OpenAI 的創始成員之一，但在 2018 年因與公司的方向分歧而辭去董事會職位。隨著 OpenAI 的技術進步，特別是 GPT 系列的推出，對於其控制權的爭議也隨之升高，尤其是在 Musk 對 AI 風險的公開擔憂背景下。
briefing.analysis: Musk 對 OpenAI 控制權的強烈關注反映了他對於 AI 發展的深刻擔憂，尤其是其潛在的社會影響。Altman 的證詞顯示，Musk 似乎對於將公司控制權交給他的後代有著不尋常的想法，這可能會引發對於公司未來方向的重大爭議。參考報導中提到，Musk 的律師對 Altman 的財務投資網絡提出質疑，可能暗示著對其誠信的挑戰。這一系列事件不僅影響 OpenAI 的內部治理，也可能對整個科技行業的企業治理模式產生影響，尤其是在涉及高風險技術的公司中。

supporting_titles: Elon Musk said control of OpenAI should go to his children, Sam Altman tells jury
Elon Musk Had ‘Hair-Raising’ Idea of Passing OpenAI On to His Kids, Sam Altman Says
supporting_summaries: Sam Altman said Elon Musk tried many times for total control of OpenAI, which he's now suing.
Musk’s lawyers questioned Altman over allegations of deception and his network of financial investments, but the OpenAI CEO painted a picture of Musk as obsessed with controlling the company.

politics.title: 'Nothing is happening' in U.S.-Russia relations: Foreign Minister Sergei Lavrov
politics.summary: After winning the ‌2024 U.S. Presidential election, Donald Trump re-established U.S. dialogue with ‌Russian President Vladimir Putin and has ‌repeatedly ⁠promised to end the ⁠war in Ukraine

briefing.news_focus: After winning the ‌2024 U.S. Presidential election, Donald Trump re-established U.S. dialogue with ‌Russian President Vladimir Putin and has ‌repeatedly ⁠promised to end the ⁠war in Ukraine
briefing.news_focus_zh: 俄羅斯外長謝爾蓋·拉夫羅夫表示，當前美俄關係中並未發生任何實質變化。他的言論是在唐納德·特朗普贏得2024年美國總統選舉後，特朗普重新建立與俄羅斯總統弗拉基米爾·普京的對話並承諾結束烏克蘭戰爭的背景下發表的。
briefing.background: 美俄關係在過去幾年中因烏克蘭衝突而急劇惡化。隨著西方國家對俄羅斯實施制裁，雙方的外交互動大幅減少。特朗普在其總統任期內曾試圖改善與俄羅斯的關係，但隨著拜登政府上任，這一趨勢被逆轉。特朗普若再次當選，可能會重新評估美國對俄政策，這引發了國際社會的廣泛關注，尤其是在烏克蘭問題上。
briefing.analysis: 拉夫羅夫的言論反映出俄方對美國政策的不滿與懷疑，特別是在特朗普承諾改善雙邊關係的背景下，俄方似乎並不期待實質性的改變。特朗普的勝選可能會使美俄之間的對話恢復，但考慮到烏克蘭戰爭的複雜性，雙方的利益仍存在根本衝突。特朗普的立場可能會受到美國國內政治的影響，特別是民主黨和部分共和黨內部對俄政策的不同看法，這可能會影響其對俄政策的實施。此外，國際社會對於美俄關係的未來走向也充滿不確定性，尤其是在烏克蘭問題上，西方國家的立場仍然強硬。

politics.title: Leaving so soon? US, China hold briefest trade talks yet before leaders’ summit
politics.summary: Senior officials from China and the United States concluded their latest round of trade talks in Seoul after less than four hours on Wednesday, the briefest session since the two countries began holding talks last year. The seventh round of negotiations – led by Chinese Vice-Premier He Lifeng and US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent – wrapped up just hours ahead of US President Donald Trump’s scheduled arrival in Beijing. The officials ended the session without speaking to the media, a departure...

briefing.news_focus: Senior officials from China and the United States concluded their latest round of trade talks in Seoul after less than four hours on Wednesday, the briefest session since the two countries began holding talks last year. The seventh round of negotiations – led by Chinese Vice-Premier He Lifeng and US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent – wrapped up just hours ahead of US President Donald Trump’s scheduled arrival in Beijing. The officials ended the session without speaking to the media, a departure...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國與中國的高層官員於首爾進行了最新一輪貿易談判，會議時間不足四小時，成為自去年以來最短的一次。此次談判由中國副總理何立峰與美國財政部長斯科特·貝森特共同領導，會議結束後未對媒體發表任何聲明，顯示雙方在即將舉行的領導人峰會前的緊張局勢。
briefing.background: 美中貿易關係自去年以來一直處於緊張狀態，雙方在多個層面上進行了多輪談判，旨在解決貿易不平衡及其他經濟問題。此次會議的背景是美國總統特朗普即將訪問北京，這使得談判的時間顯得尤為緊迫。雙方在貿易政策上的分歧仍然存在，且未能達成具體協議，顯示出解決問題的困難。
briefing.analysis: 此次談判的短暫性引發了外界對美中貿易關係未來走向的擔憂。雖然雙方在會議中進行了討論，但未能達成任何具體協議，顯示出雙方在核心問題上的分歧仍然存在。根據參考報導，格林蘭首相也提到與美國的談判進展，但同樣未達成協議，這可能反映出更廣泛的國際貿易環境中的不確定性。各方對於未來的貿易政策及其影響仍持觀望態度，未來的發展將取決於雙方在即將召開的領導人峰會上的互動。

supporting_titles: Progress in talks with U.S. but no deal yet: Greenland PM
supporting_summaries: "We are negotiating but we don't have an agreement," Prime Minister Jens-Frederik Nielsen said in a speech to the Copenhagen Democracy Summit

politics.title: Why the world needs China to save more, not less
politics.summary: The G7 economists’ memo from March and the IMF’s April report on global imbalances arrived at the same prescription: China’s current account surplus is excessive and should be cut by boosting consumption. The diagnosis is wrong. The world economy, especially emerging markets and developing economies, benefits from China’s high saving. A current account surplus is the excess of national saving over domestic investment. The saving is not lost; it is exported abroad in the form of net capital...

briefing.news_focus: The G7 economists’ memo from March and the IMF’s April report on global imbalances arrived at the same prescription: China’s current account surplus is excessive and should be cut by boosting consumption. The diagnosis is wrong. The world economy, especially emerging markets and developing economies, benefits from China’s high saving. A current account surplus is the excess of national saving over domestic investment. The saving is not lost; it is exported abroad in the form of net capital...
briefing.news_focus_zh: G7經濟學家的備忘錄與國際貨幣基金組織（IMF）的報告指出，中國的經常帳盈餘過高，應透過提升消費來減少。然而，這一診斷被認為是錯誤的，因為中國的高儲蓄對全球經濟，特別是新興市場和發展中國家是有益的。經常帳盈餘代表國家儲蓄超過國內投資，這些儲蓄並未消失，而是以淨資本的形式輸出到國外。
briefing.background: 中國的經常帳盈餘長期以來一直是全球經濟討論的焦點。G7及IMF的建議反映了對中國經濟模式的擔憂，認為過高的儲蓄可能抑制全球需求，特別是在經濟復甦的過程中。中國的高儲蓄率使其能夠在全球市場中扮演重要角色，特別是在資本輸出方面，這對許多依賴外資的發展中國家至關重要。儘管如此，這一模式也引發了對中國內需不足的批評，並促使國際社會呼籲中國進行結構性改革以促進消費。
briefing.analysis: 各方對中國經常帳盈餘的看法存在分歧。G7和IMF認為中國應減少儲蓄以促進全球經濟增長，但這一觀點遭到質疑，認為中國的高儲蓄實際上對新興市場和發展中國家有利。這一觀點強調儲蓄的輸出對全球資本流動的重要性，並指出中國的經濟模式在當前全球經濟環境中仍然具有其必要性。參考報導提到中國密切關注印度與越南的關係，雖然與主新聞無直接關聯，但顯示出中國在地緣政治上的關注，可能影響其經濟策略的調整。

supporting_titles: Why Is China Watching India-Vietnam Relations Carefully
supporting_summaries: China appears to be closely monitoring the development of India-Vietnam relations, particularly in the areas of defense, maritime affairs, and strategic technology.

economy.title: Chinese company that tracked US bombers over Iran wears sanctions with pride
economy.summary: Chinese satellite imagery firm MizarVision, which rose to fame with its analysis of American military deployments in the US-Israel war on Iran, is treating its addition to the US sanctions list as a badge of honour in its hiring campaign. The open-source intelligence (OSINT) start-up, formally known as Meentropy Technology Hangzhou Co Ltd, specialises in analysing data from commercial satellites and has conducted several observations of US military movements in recent months. It was added to the...

briefing.news_focus: Chinese satellite imagery firm MizarVision, which rose to fame with its analysis of American military deployments in the US-Israel war on Iran, is treating its addition to the US sanctions list as a badge of honour in its hiring campaign. The open-source intelligence (OSINT) start-up, formally known as Meentropy Technology Hangzhou Co Ltd, specialises in analysing data from commercial satellites and has conducted several observations of US military movements in recent months. It was added to the...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國衛星影像公司MizarVision因其對美國軍事部署在美以伊戰爭中的分析而受到關注。該公司最近被列入美國制裁名單，但卻將此視為招聘活動中的一種榮譽。MizarVision專注於分析商業衛星數據，並在近期對美國軍事動態進行了多次觀察。
briefing.background: MizarVision，正式名稱為Meentropy Technology Hangzhou Co Ltd，是一家專注於開源情報(OSINT)的初創公司。該公司利用商業衛星數據進行軍事和地緣政治分析，特別是在美國與以色列的衝突中，對伊朗的軍事部署進行了詳細追蹤。隨著全球對衛星數據需求的增加，這類公司在國際安全和情報領域的角色愈發重要。美國對MizarVision的制裁反映了其對中國企業在軍事情報領域活動的擔憂，尤其是在涉及敏感地區的情況下。
briefing.analysis: MizarVision的制裁標誌著中美之間在科技和軍事情報領域的緊張關係加劇。該公司將制裁視為榮譽，顯示出其對美國政策的挑戰和對自身業務的自信。這一做法可能吸引了對抗美國影響力的中國企業和人才，進一步鞏固其在開源情報市場的地位。另一方面，美國的制裁措施可能會促使其他國家在選擇合作夥伴時更加謹慎，尤其是在涉及軍事和安全的合作上。未來，MizarVision的發展將取決於其如何在國際市場上平衡業務擴展與政治風險之間的關係。

economy.title: Xi-Trump meeting could lift Chinese stocks 12%: Morgan Stanley
economy.summary: Morgan Stanley expects US President Donald Trump’s visit to Beijing to give Chinese stocks a moderate lift if the current trade truce is extended. The bank’s base case forecasts an 8 per cent gain to 28,400 for Hong Kong’s Hang Seng Index by the second quarter of 2027, as well as an 11 per cent rise in the Hang Seng China Enterprises Index and a 12 per cent increase for the MSCI China Index, according to its report on Wednesday. The bull case stretches to 27 per cent for the MSCI China gauge if...

briefing.news_focus: Morgan Stanley expects US President Donald Trump’s visit to Beijing to give Chinese stocks a moderate lift if the current trade truce is extended. The bank’s base case forecasts an 8 per cent gain to 28,400 for Hong Kong’s Hang Seng Index by the second quarter of 2027, as well as an 11 per cent rise in the Hang Seng China Enterprises Index and a 12 per cent increase for the MSCI China Index, according to its report on Wednesday. The bull case stretches to 27 per cent for the MSCI China gauge if...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 摩根士丹利預測，美國總統特朗普的北京訪問可能會促使中國股市上漲，若目前的貿易休戰得以延續，香港恒生指數預計在2027年第二季度上漲8%，達到28,400點。此外，恒生中國企業指數將上漲11%，MSCI中國指數則可能上漲12%。在最佳情況下，MSCI中國指數的增幅可達27%。
briefing.background: 中美貿易關係在過去幾年中經歷了多次波動，貿易戰的影響使得兩國經濟和市場情緒受到壓制。近期，雙方在貿易問題上展開了最後的談判，這可能是特朗普訪問前的重要舉措。市場對於貿易休戰的期待，尤其是在特朗普與習近平會晤的背景下，對於投資者信心的恢復至關重要。摩根士丹利的預測反映了市場對於未來經濟回暖的期待，尤其是在中國經濟增長放緩的情況下。
briefing.analysis: 摩根士丹利的預測顯示，市場對於特朗普訪問北京的反應可能是積極的，尤其是如果貿易休戰得以延續。這一預測反映了投資者對於中美關係改善的期待，並可能促使資金流入中國股市。然而，參考報導提到的中美貿易首席談判官的最後會談，則暗示著雙方在貿易問題上仍存在不確定性。若談判未能達成共識，市場情緒可能會迅速轉向悲觀。因此，雖然摩根士丹利的預測是基於樂觀的情境，但市場的實際反應仍需觀察雙方談判的結果及其對貿易政策的影響。

supporting_titles: China, US trade chiefs huddle for last-minute talks before Trump visit

economy.title: How Australia’s mining giants are helping China to globalise the yuan
economy.summary: Australia’s mining giants are aiding China’s push to internationalise its currency and reduce the dominance of the US dollar, as they gradually shift towards using the yuan for financing and settlements, analysts said. China has been using its heft as the world’s dominant iron ore buyer to push global mining companies to adopt the yuan. And several firms are already making the switch, with China’s relatively low interest rates becoming an added incentive. BHP, the world’s largest mining company,...

briefing.news_focus: Australia’s mining giants are aiding China’s push to internationalise its currency and reduce the dominance of the US dollar, as they gradually shift towards using the yuan for financing and settlements, analysts said. China has been using its heft as the world’s dominant iron ore buyer to push global mining companies to adopt the yuan. And several firms are already making the switch, with China’s relatively low interest rates becoming an added incentive. BHP, the world’s largest mining company,...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 澳大利亞的礦業巨頭正在協助中國推動人民幣的國際化，逐步轉向使用人民幣進行融資和結算。分析師指出，中國作為全球主要的鐵礦石買家，利用其市場地位促使全球礦業公司採用人民幣。多家企業已經開始轉變，並且中國相對較低的利率成為一項額外的誘因。
briefing.background: 中國政府近年來積極推動人民幣國際化，旨在減少對美元的依賴，並提升人民幣在全球貿易中的地位。澳大利亞擁有豐富的礦產資源，特別是鐵礦石，這使其成為中國的重要供應來源。隨著中國經濟的增長，對礦產資源的需求持續上升，這也促使澳大利亞的礦業公司考慮用人民幣進行交易，以便更好地滿足中國市場的需求。此外，全球經濟環境的變化及地緣政治的影響，也使得各國企業在貨幣使用上更加謹慎。
briefing.analysis: 澳大利亞的礦業巨頭轉向人民幣，顯示出他們對中國市場的依賴程度加深，並可能影響全球貿易格局。這一轉變不僅有助於中國推動人民幣國際化，還可能促使其他國家和企業考慮類似的做法。然而，這也可能引發對美元主導地位的挑戰，尤其是在資源交易中。不同的礦業公司可能對此有不同的看法，部分公司可能仍然偏好使用美元以避免匯率風險。未來，若更多企業跟隨這一趨勢，將可能加速人民幣在全球市場的接受度。
